content.hint: 表达愿意继续提供帮助，体现专业与关怀

blanks.answer: If you have any other questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

If you have any other questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

content.situation: 你刚帮助一位客户解决了关于产品退货的疑问，对方表示感谢，你需要礼貌结束对话并表达祝福。
content.speakerText: Thank you so much for your help—I feel much more confident now!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你的帮助，我现在更有信心了！
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌结束对话 + 主动提供后续支持

content.hint: 表达祝福，增强对话的温暖感和闭环性

blanks.answer: Hope you find everything you're looking for!

Let me know if you need more directions.

content.situation: 你刚为一位访客指明了图书馆的位置，对方感谢你，你希望友好地结束对话并留下积极印象。

content.hint: 强调持续支持意愿，保持开放沟通态度

content.situation: 你帮一位同事理清了会议安排的细节，对方说谢谢，你希望自然结束对话并表达支持。
content.speakerText: Thanks for clarifying the schedule—I was totally confused before!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你理清了日程，我之前完全糊涂了！

content.hint: 表达支持的常用动词短语，常用于鼓励他人
content.template: You’re welcome! Good luck with your application—I’m ___ for you!
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：be rooting for someone（支持某人）

content.hint: 表示‘等待接收’的常用搭配
content.template: Perfect! I’ll ___ out for it—and if you need help, just say the word.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：look out for（留意、等待）

content.hint: 表达感激时最常用的正式动词
content.template: Thanks for your time—I really ___ your help.
